---
listing: 
  contents: talks
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
  fields: [date,title]
---  

<script async src="https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-6878992848042528"
     crossorigin="anonymous"></script>  

## Current Research  

- Machine Learning in Finance
  


## Research Interest 

- Applied Data Science
- Financial Mathematics

## Publications


```{=html}
<table>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>
        <a href='https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=gTz5r68AAAAJ&hl=en' target='_blank' style='display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;'><img src='/_assets/images/gs.png' height='15' width='15' alt='Google Scholar' style='margin-right: 5px;'></span><span style='display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;'> Google Scholar</span></a>
      </td>
      <td>
        <a href='https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Mohammad-Rafiqul-Islam-5' target='_blank' style='display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;'><img src='/_assets/images/rg.png' height='15' width='15' alt='ResearchGate' style='margin-right: 5px;'></span><span style='display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;'> ResearchGate</span></a>
      </td>
      <td>
        <a href='https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4376-8971' target='_blank' style='display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;'><img src='/_assets/images/orcid.png' height='15' width='15' alt='Orcid' style='margin-right: 5px;'></span><span style='display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;'> Orcid</span></a>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

- <a href="/publication/pub3/index.qmd" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none">Generalized EXTRA stochastic gradient Langevin dynamics</a>  
  Mert, Gurbuzbalaban; Islam, Mohammad Rafiqul; Wang, Xiaoyu; Zhu, Lingjiong  (2024) "Generalized EXTRA stochastic gradient Langevin dynamics." *arXiv preprint arXiv.2412.01993*


## Course Projects  

- <a href="https://www.academia.edu/13322836/Study_of_Runge_Kutta_Method_of_Higher_orders_and_its_Applications" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none">Study of Runge-Kutta Method of Higher orders and its Applications</a>  
  Advisor: <a href="http://appliedmath.du.ac.bd/details-ofdr-md-abdus-samad/" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none">Dr. Md. Abdus Samad </a>

  <div style="text-align: justify">
    This project is concerned with the study 
  </div>


## Talks and Presentations
